# Test Programs

This directory contains two sets of test programs:

## compliance_I

Official RISC-V I-extension compliance tests from [riscv-arch-test](https://github.com/riscv/riscv-arch-test) (ACT4 branch). These test individual instructions against the official specification.

**Directory structure**: Each `I-<instruction>-00/` folder contains:
- `program.S` - Assembly test case

**Expected signatures**: Generated by running `program.S` through the Sail RISC-V reference model. The signatures are computed during the compliance test run, not stored in the repo.

### Prerequisites

- `sail_riscv_sim` binary from the official Sail RISC-V 0.11 release
- Python 3

## rv32i

Custom C-based test programs for functional verification. Each directory contains:
- `program.c` - C source code
- `expected.txt` - Expected signature output

These are simpler integration tests, not part of the official compliance suite.

## Running Tests

From the `rtl/top` directory:

```sh
# Run local C functional tests
make python

# Run official RV32I compliance tests against Sail reference
make compliance COMPLIANCE_REFERENCE=sail COMPLIANCE_I="$(make -s -C ../../programs/compliance_I list)"
```

See `rtl/top/Makefile` for details on test infrastructure and comparison methods.
